lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Outfitting planner used to model the exploration fit, scoop sizing and engineered jump range.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hull data — optional internal sizes, FSD class and core layout used for the spec grid and loadout.

sources.label: Inara — Cobra Mk V
sources.what: Hull stats, slot layout and module sellers checked for the exploration build.

sources.label: Fandom — Cobra Mk V
sources.what: Manufacturer (Faulcon DeLacy) and role history backing the dossier write-up.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Cobra Mk V ship page — manufacturer specs and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Full review of the Cobra Mk V covering jump range and exploration potential, cross-checked against the build here.
